# OpenCLI API Reference
<!-- Generated by Copilot -->

This document provides a reference for the OpenCLI REST API endpoints, which allow you to interact with OpenPanel programmatically.

## Authentication

All API requests require authentication using an API token. You can obtain an API token using:

```bash
opencli api-token-generate
```

Include the token in the HTTP Authorization header:

```
Authorization: Bearer YOUR_API_TOKEN
```

## Domains API

### List all domains

```
GET /api/v1/domains
```

**Parameters:**

| Parameter | Type   | Description                          |
|-----------|--------|--------------------------------------|
| user      | string | (Optional) Filter domains by username |
| format    | string | (Optional) Response format: json (default), simple |

**Example Request:**

```bash
curl -H "Authorization: Bearer YOUR_API_TOKEN" \
  https://panel.example.com/api/v1/domains
```

**Example Response:**

```json
{
  "domains": [
    {
      "name": "example.com",
      "user": "admin",
      "created_at": "2023-01-15 14:30:22",
      "status": "active"
    },
    {
      "name": "test.com",
      "user": "client1",
      "created_at": "2023-02-20 09:12:45",
      "status": "active"
    }
  ]
}
```

### Add a domain

```
POST /api/v1/domains
```

**Request Body:**

```json
{
  "domain": "newdomain.com",
  "user": "username",
  "docroot": "/var/www/html/newdomain" // Optional
}
```

**Example Request:**

```bash
curl -X POST -H "Authorization: Bearer YOUR_API_TOKEN" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"domain":"newdomain.com","user":"client1"}' \
  https://panel.example.com/api/v1/domains
```

**Example Response:**

```json
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Domain newdomain.com has been added for user client1",
  "domain": {
    "name": "newdomain.com",
    "user": "client1",
    "created_at": "2023-06-01 11:22:33",
    "status": "active"
  }
}
```

### Delete a domain

```
DELETE /api/v1/domains/{domain}
```

**Parameters:**

| Parameter | Type   | Description                  |
|-----------|--------|------------------------------|
| force     | boolean| (Optional) Force deletion without confirmation |

**Example Request:**

```bash
curl -X DELETE -H "Authorization: Bearer YOUR_API_TOKEN" \
  https://panel.example.com/api/v1/domains/example.com?force=true
```

**Example Response:**

```json
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Domain example.com has been deleted"
}
```

## Users API

### List all users

```
GET /api/v1/users
```

**Parameters:**

| Parameter | Type   | Description                          |
|-----------|--------|--------------------------------------|
| format    | string | (Optional) Response format: json (default), simple |

**Example Response:**

```json
{
  "users": [
    {
      "username": "admin",
      "email": "admin@example.com",
      "plan": "admin",
      "created_at": "2023-01-01 00:00:00",
      "status": "active"
    },
    {
      "username": "client1",
      "email": "client1@example.com",
      "plan": "basic",
      "created_at": "2023-01-15 14:30:22",
      "status": "active"
    }
  ]
}
```

### Create a user

```
POST /api/v1/users
```

**Request Body:**

```json
{
  "username": "newuser",
  "password": "securepassword",
  "email": "newuser@example.com",
  "plan": "basic"
}
```

**Example Response:**

```json
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "User newuser has been created",
  "user": {
    "username": "newuser",
    "email": "newuser@example.com",
    "plan": "basic",
    "created_at": "2023-06-01 11:22:33",
    "status": "active"
  }
}
```

### Delete a user

```
DELETE /api/v1/users/{username}
```

**Parameters:**

| Parameter | Type   | Description                  |
|-----------|--------|------------------------------|
| backup    | boolean| (Optional) Create backup before deletion |
| force     | boolean| (Optional) Force deletion without confirmation |

**Example Request:**

```bash
curl -X DELETE -H "Authorization: Bearer YOUR_API_TOKEN" \
  https://panel.example.com/api/v1/users/username?force=true&backup=true
```

**Example Response:**

```json
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "User username has been deleted"
}
```

## Plans API

### List all plans

```
GET /api/v1/plans
```

**Parameters:**

| Parameter | Type   | Description                          |
|-----------|--------|--------------------------------------|
| format    | string | (Optional) Response format: json (default), table |

**Example Request:**

```bash
curl -H "Authorization: Bearer YOUR_API_TOKEN" \
  https://panel.example.com/api/v1/plans
```

**Example Response:**

```json
{
  "plans": [
    {
      "id": 1,
      "name": "Basic",
      "description": "Basic Hosting Plan",
      "email_limit": 10,
      "ftp_limit": 5,
      "domains_limit": 10,
      "websites_limit": 5,
      "disk_limit": "50 GB",
      "inodes_limit": 500000,
      "db_limit": 10,
      "cpu": 2,
      "ram": "4g",
      "docker_image": "openpanel/nginx",
      "bandwidth": 1000
    },
    {
      "id": 2,
      "name": "Premium",
      "description": "Premium Hosting Plan",
      "email_limit": 100,
      "ftp_limit": 20,
      "domains_limit": 30,
      "websites_limit": 15,
      "disk_limit": "100 GB",
      "inodes_limit": 1000000,
      "db_limit": 30,
      "cpu": 4,
      "ram": "8g",
      "docker_image": "openpanel/nginx",
      "bandwidth": 2000
    }
  ]
}
```

### Create a plan

```
POST /api/v1/plans
```

**Request Body:**

```json
{
  "name": "custom",
  "description": "Custom Plan",
  "email_limit": 50,
  "ftp_limit": 10,
  "domains_limit": 20,
  "websites_limit": 10,
  "disk_limit": 75,
  "inodes_limit": 750000,
  "db_limit": 20,
  "cpu": 3,
  "ram": 6,
  "docker_image": "nginx",
  "bandwidth": 1500
}
```

**Example Response:**

```json
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Plan 'custom' has been created",
  "plan": {
    "id": 3,
    "name": "custom",
    "description": "Custom Plan",
    "email_limit": 50,
    "ftp_limit": 10,
    "domains_limit": 20,
    "websites_limit": 10,
    "disk_limit": "75 GB",
    "inodes_limit": 750000,
    "db_limit": 20,
    "cpu": 3,
    "ram": "6g",
    "docker_image": "openpanel/nginx",
    "bandwidth": 1500
  }
}
```

### Update a plan

```
PUT /api/v1/plans/{plan_id}
```

**Request Body:**

```json
{
  "name": "custom-renamed",
  "description": "Updated Custom Plan",
  "email_limit": 75,
  "ftp_limit": 15,
  "domains_limit": 25,
  "websites_limit": 12,
  "disk_limit": 80,
  "inodes_limit": 800000,
  "db_limit": 22,
  "cpu": 4,
  "ram": 8,
  "docker_image": "nginx",
  "bandwidth": 1600
}
```

**Example Response:**

```json
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Plan has been updated",
  "plan": {
    "id": 3,
    "name": "custom-renamed",
    "description": "Updated Custom Plan",
    "email_limit": 75,
    "ftp_limit": 15,
    "domains_limit": 25,
    "websites_limit": 12,
    "disk_limit": "80 GB",
    "inodes_limit": 800000,
    "db_limit": 22,
    "cpu": 4,
    "ram": "8g",
    "docker_image": "openpanel/nginx",
    "bandwidth": 1600
  }
}
```

## PHP API

### List available PHP versions

```
GET /api/v1/php/versions
```

**Parameters:**

| Parameter | Type   | Description                          |
|-----------|--------|--------------------------------------|
| user      | string | (Optional) Filter by username |

**Example Response:**

```json
{
  "available_versions": ["7.4", "8.0", "8.1", "8.2"],
  "installed_versions": {
    "client1": ["7.4", "8.1"]
  }
}
```

### Install PHP version for a user

```
POST /api/v1/php/install
```

**Request Body:**

```json
{
  "username": "client1",
  "version": "8.2"
}
```

**Example Response:**

```json
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "PHP 8.2 has been installed for user client1"
}
```

## Backups API

### List user backups

```
GET /api/v1/backups/{username}
```

**Example Response:**

```json
{
  "backups": [
    {
      "id": "backup_client1_20230601_112233",
      "created_at": "2023-06-01 11:22:33",
      "size": "1.2 GB",
      "type": "full"
    },
    {
      "id": "backup_client1_20230510_091011",
      "created_at": "2023-05-10 09:10:11",
      "size": "1.1 GB",
      "type": "full"
    }
  ]
}
```

### Create a backup

```
POST /api/v1/backups
```

**Request Body:**

```json
{
  "username": "client1",
  "type": "full"
}
```

**Example Response:**

```json
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Backup for user client1 has been initiated",
  "backup_id": "backup_client1_20230615_143322"
}
```

## System API

### Get system status

```
GET /api/v1/system/status
```

**Example Response:**

```json
{
  "status": "ok",
  "cpu": {
    "usage_percentage": 24.5
  },
  "memory": {
    "total": "16 GB",
    "used": "8 GB",
    "usage_percentage": 50
  },
  "disk": {
    "used": "45 GB",
    "available": "55 GB",
    "usage_percentage": 45
  },
  "services": {
    "openpanel": "running",
    "admin": "running",
    "mysql": "running",
    "nginx": "running"
  },
  "version": "1.2.3",
  "uptime": "2 days, 5 hours, 30 minutes"
}
```

### Control system services

```
POST /api/v1/system/services
```

**Request Body:**

```json
{
  "service": "openpanel",
  "action": "restart"
}
```

**Example Response:**

```json
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Service openpanel restart operation completed successfully"
}
```

### Initiate uninstall process

```
POST /api/v1/system/uninstall
```

**Request Body:**

```json
{
  "purge": true,
  "keep_backups": false
}
```

**Example Response:**

```json
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Uninstallation process has been initiated",
  "job_id": "uninstall_20230615_143322"
}
```

### Check uninstall status

```
GET /api/v1/system/uninstall/status/{job_id}
```

**Example Response:**

```json
{
  "job_id": "uninstall_20230615_143322",
  "status": "in_progress",
  "progress": 65,
  "message": "Removing OpenCLI files",
  "completed_steps": ["stop_services", "remove_opencli_files"],
  "remaining_steps": ["remove_config_files", "cleanup_system"],
  "error": null
}
```

## Implementation Status

This API documentation describes the planned REST API endpoints. The actual implementation may be in progress. To check which API endpoints are currently available, use:

```bash
opencli api-list
```
